sshCaInfo: Sign your SSH public key to obtain a short-lived certificate for passwordless authentication.
sshCaStep1: Save the certificate next to your private key, adding -cert.pub to its name:
sshCaStep2: SSH will automatically use the certificate when connecting:
sshCaStep3: Or specify the private key explicitly (SSH finds the matching certificate):
sshPublicKeyHelp: Paste the contents of your ~/.ssh/id_ed25519.pub or ~/.ssh/id_rsa.pub file
